description_long: This house features a modern, low-profile design with a flat roof and clean, rectilinear lines. The structure is composed of two main volumes: a larger primary living area and a smaller detached section, possibly a garage or auxiliary space, both connected by a broad paved area. The exterior is finished in a combination of light-colored concrete or stucco and large glass panels, especially prominent on the main facade, allowing for ample natural light. The roof is entirely flat, emphasizing the contemporary architectural style, and the windows are arranged in horizontal bands, contributing to the sleek appearance. The property includes a spacious driveway and what appears to be a covered entryway or carport. Minimalist landscaping and the absence of ornate details reinforce the modern aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large glass panels, clean lines, and a spacious driveway. The design features two main volumes and a minimalist, contemporary exterior.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the main entrance, large glass windows, and the broad driveway leading to the house.
description_view_1: This side view shows the depth of the main volume and the connection to the smaller detached section, with the flat rooflines clearly visible.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the back facade, with fewer windows and a more private appearance, as well as the secondary structure.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the separation between the main house and the auxiliary section, with the paved area in between.
attribute_window_arrangement: horizontal bands of large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, large glass doors, and a paved approach, minimal decorative elements
